name: Blue Cross Blue Shield
wegovy_coverage: Varies by plan — prior authorization typically required, often denied for obesity-only diagnoses.
ozempic_coverage: Usually covered for type 2 diabetes diagnosis with minimal restrictions.
mounjaro_coverage: Usually covered for type 2 diabetes diagnosis; subject to step therapy in some plans.
zepbound_coverage: Varies dramatically by plan — many BCBS plans require BMI ≥35, prior auth, and step therapy.

name: UnitedHealthcare
wegovy_coverage: Limited — UHC removed Wegovy from many formularies in 2024–2025. Prior auth required where covered.
ozempic_coverage: Generally covered for type 2 diabetes with prior auth.
mounjaro_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes; step therapy through metformin typically required.
zepbound_coverage: Many UHC plans excluded Zepbound from formularies in 2025. Coverage rare and requires extensive prior auth.

name: Aetna
wegovy_coverage: Covered on many commercial plans with BMI requirements (≥30, or ≥27 with comorbidity) and prior auth.
ozempic_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes diagnosis with standard prior auth.
mounjaro_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes; some plans require step therapy.
zepbound_coverage: Coverage on commercial plans varies. Aetna Medicare Advantage plans typically don't cover Zepbound.

name: Cigna
wegovy_coverage: Some Cigna plans cover Wegovy with prior auth, BMI ≥30, and a documented weight management program.
ozempic_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes with prior auth in most plans.
mounjaro_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes; step therapy through metformin or another GLP-1 commonly required.
zepbound_coverage: Limited coverage with strict prior auth criteria.

name: Humana
wegovy_coverage: Generally not covered on Humana Medicare Advantage plans. Some commercial plans cover with prior auth.
ozempic_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes diagnosis on most plans.
mounjaro_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes diagnosis; some plans require step therapy.
zepbound_coverage: Not covered on Medicare Advantage. Limited commercial coverage.

name: Anthem
wegovy_coverage: Coverage varies by employer plan. Prior auth and BMI documentation required.
ozempic_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes diagnosis in most plans.
mounjaro_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes; step therapy may apply.
zepbound_coverage: Coverage varies by plan. Many Anthem employer groups exclude obesity-indicated GLP-1s.

name: Kaiser Permanente
wegovy_coverage: Available within Kaiser obesity-medicine programs with strict BMI and behavioral program criteria.
ozempic_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes diagnosis through Kaiser pharmacy.
mounjaro_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes; Kaiser providers typically prefer semaglutide first line.
zepbound_coverage: Limited availability through Kaiser obesity-medicine programs.

name: Medicare
wegovy_coverage: Medicare Part D covers Wegovy only when prescribed for cardiovascular risk reduction (post-2024 CMS guidance), not for obesity alone.
ozempic_coverage: Covered under Medicare Part D for type 2 diabetes diagnosis.
mounjaro_coverage: Covered under Medicare Part D for type 2 diabetes diagnosis.
zepbound_coverage: Not covered for weight loss. Federal law prohibits Medicare from covering anti-obesity medications without separate Congressional action.

name: Medicaid
wegovy_coverage: Coverage varies dramatically by state. Some states (CA, MN, PA, RI) cover Wegovy for obesity; most do not.
ozempic_coverage: Covered in nearly all state Medicaid programs for type 2 diabetes diagnosis.
mounjaro_coverage: Covered in most state Medicaid programs for type 2 diabetes.
zepbound_coverage: Coverage varies by state. A small number of states cover Zepbound for obesity with strict criteria.

name: TRICARE (Military)
wegovy_coverage: Covered by TRICARE with prior auth for active-duty members and dependents meeting BMI criteria.
ozempic_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes diagnosis under TRICARE pharmacy benefit.
mounjaro_coverage: Covered for type 2 diabetes; step therapy may apply.
zepbound_coverage: Coverage with prior auth, BMI ≥30 (or ≥27 with comorbidity), and step therapy in some cases.
